posts.author: BenATawardco (Benjamin Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would love to have the ability to have better ability to report on groups within dashboards. Things like, count of groups on board, how many groups were move in to/out of a board, count of groups created within a certain time period, etc…

What are you trying to achieve

This would help us with analytics on current programs and what is happening with those programs as we treat groups as programs or projects for our clients and have boards with hundreds of groups.
